__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=Goldbach Conjecture,Olympic Charter,The Works of Nature
|rank=orange
|amount=3
|category=self
|description=Per 10 Lucky Coins gained, Snail RUSH +8; Lucky Coins Gained: 400/400
}}
[[Category:Self]]
[[Category:RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Lucky Coins]]
